Ochnella leptoclada is a plant species in the Ochnaceae family, native to tropical regions. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can aid in treating various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The bioactive constituents of Ochnella leptoclada may include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, although specific information is limited.
